allow: Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@46.224.171.53 "cd /opt/leaddrive-v2 && echo 'DEPLOY_DONE: '\\$\(git log --oneline -1\) && pm2 jlist | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=[x for x in d if x[\\"name\\"]==\\"leaddrive-v2\\"][0]; print\(\\"PM2: status=\\"+p[\\"pm2_env\\"][\\"status\\"]+\\" restarts=\\"+str\(p[\\"pm2_env\\"][\\"restart_time\\"]\)+\\" uptime_ms=\\"+str\(p[\\"pm2_env\\"].get\(\\"pm_uptime\\",0\)\)\)' && curl -sS -o /dev/null -w 'HEALTH: http_code=%{http_code}\\n' http://localhost:3001/")
